events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate sequence violation: defect passed downstream instead of pulled. Work in-progress. Need decision fail because non-compliant. Risk high/critical? Defect passed downstream can cause quality escape, rework, customer impact. In manufacturing quality gate, passing defective downstream is serious. Risk high maybe critical? Let's decide high. component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. work_stage in-progress. percent_complete maybe 60? value 0. sound_source empty? not audio. confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0. order: sequence steps for Andon & quality response: detect defect, stop line/andon, contain, notify, assess, disposition, pull/rework, release. Since violation is passed downstream instead of pulled, correct order should include pull before pass. We can list order of correct sequence. workable maybe empty or activities that can still start: containment, sort, rework. Need findings: defect passed downstream, bypassed pull/rework, quality escape. actions: stop line, contain suspect product, notify quality/supervisor, quarantine downstream units, perform defect pull/rework, verify quality gate before release. rationale. references: site quality procedures, Andon response standard work, ISO 9001 clause 8.7 control of nonconforming outputs, lean/standard work. Need ensure JSON valid.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": [
    "installed-defective",
    "non-compliant"
  ],
  "percent_complete": 60,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [
    "detect-defect",
    "activate-andon",
    "stop-line",
    "notify-supervisor-quality",
    "contain-suspect-product",
    "assess-defect",
    "pull-or-rework",
    "verify-quality-gate",
    "release-to-downstream"
  ],
  "workable": [
    "contain-suspect-product",
    "quarantine-downstream-units",
    "defect-assessment",
    "pull-rework",
    "re-inspect"
  ],
  "findings": [
    "Defective component passed downstream instead of being pulled or contained",
    "Quality gate bypassed, creating risk of customer escape and downstream rework",
    "Andon/quality response sequence violated"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the line and activate andon",
    "Contain and quarantine all suspect product downstream",
    "Notify supervisor and quality personnel immediately",
    "Identify and segregate the defective unit(s)",
    "Perform required rework or replacement per quality disposition",
    "Re-inspect and verify the quality gate before releasing any product downstream"
  ],
  "rationale": "The correct Andon and quality response sequence requires stopping, containing, and pulling defective product before any downstream release. Passing the defect downstream bypasses the quality gate and is non-compliant with standard work, so work must stop until containment, rework, and verification are complete.",
  "references": [
    "site quality procedures",
    "ISO 9001:2015 clause 8.7 - Control of nonconforming outputs",
    "Andon response standard work"
  ]
}
